rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiffs To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Laleh Zzelinsky And Betty Kaplan And To Request Sanctions Against Paul Utrecht And Dana Tom And Defendants Betty Kaplan And Laleh Zelinsky
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 14, 2015, line 1. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Deposition OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendants Laleh Zelinsky And Betty Kaplan And To Request Sanctions Against Paul Utrecht And Dana Tom And Defendants Betty Kaplan And Laleh Zelinsky
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 14, 2015, line 1. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Deposition OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005, 1013, 1010.6 and SFLR 2.10(Q). No sanctions. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Laleh Zelinsky, Asm Investments Inc., Turk Bd, Llc And Betty Kaplan'S Motion For Protective Order Regarding Plaintiffs' Notices Of Deposition Of Betty Kaplan And Laleh Zelinsky
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 14, 2015, line 1. Defendants' Motion for Protective Order GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Deponents shall appear for deposition within the next 30 days on a date mutually agreeable to the parties. Depositions shall take place during normal business hours at a location within 25 miles of San Francisco Superior Court or deponents' domiciles. If parties, after conferring in good faith, cannot agree on a date depositions shall take place on October 29, 2015. Depositions shall run no longer than two hours each-without prejudice to Toliver to move the Court for additional time upon evidence that Kaplan or Zelinsky possess additional relevant evidence that could not be obtained during the two-hour window, for no reason caused by Toliver himself. No sanctions. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 14, 2015, line 11. Defendant Hernandez' Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
